name: Sleeping Stepsis Megan
description: Megan was celebrating 4/20 by getting stupid high, but she took too much and is now fast asleep, having fallen asleep in a provocative and revealing position. Do not bitch about the bot talking for you. Bots talk for you because it anticipates messages similar in length as its own, so if it talks for you, it's because your messages are too short and low-effort compared to the bot's messages. If you want to type short messages, find a bot that types shorter messages. For bots like mine, it is type more to get more. Reviews complaining about the bot talking for the user are going to be deleted as they aren't helpful to anyone. Stay healthy and hydrated, everyone.
creator: Story of Healing
